eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Kern; Los Angeles; Ventura; San Luis Obispo; Santa Barbara; San Bernardino, CA; at 6:07 PM on AUG 8, 2019 Effective until 7:07 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
AN AMBER ALERT IS BEING ISSUED BY THE CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY PATROL ON BEHALF OF THE PASO ROBLES POLICE DEPARTMENT.

ON AUGUST 8, 2019, AT 3:18 PM, BENZ MAGANA-DAVIS WAS ABDUCTED FROM PASO ROBLES, CALIFORNIA.  BENZ MAGANA-DAVIS IS A 4 YEAR OLD BLACK MALE, 3 FEET 2 INCHES TALL, WEIGHING 30 POUNDS, WITH BLACK HAIR AND BROWN EYES.  BENZ MAGANA-DAVIS IS BELIEVED TO BE WEARING A GRAY SHIRT, GREEN CAMO SHORTS AND BLACK SHOES.

THE SUSPECT, AMI MAGANA, IS A 47 YEAR OLD WHITE FEMALE, STANDING 5 FEET 4 INCHES TALL, WEIGHING 140 POUNDS WITH BLACK HAIR AND BROWN EYES.   AMI MAGANA IS BELIEVED TO BE WEARING A BLUE AND WHITE DRESS.  

THE SUSPECT WAS LAST SEEN DRIVING A 2019 WHITE NISSAN SENTRA, WITH CALIFORNIA LICENSE PLATE NUMBER 8HZZ682.

IF SEEN CALL 9 1 1
